serviceDescription: Amazon Neptune is a fast, reliable, fully managed graph database service that makes it easy to build and run applications that work with highly connected datasets.

templates.title: Neptune Cluster
templates.description: The database is provided with the instance type you select.

cards.title: Cluster Configuration Option
cards.description: Database instance, storage and IO charges will vary based on the configuration. Review Amazon Aurora pricing for more information

components.content: Cost effective pricing for many applications with moderate I/O usage (I/O costs <25% of total database costs). Pay-per-request I/O charges apply. DB instance and storage prices don't include I/O usage.

Predictable pricing for all applications. Improved price-performance for I/O-intensive applications (I/O costs >25% of total database costs).No additional charges for read/write I/O operations. DB instance and storage prices includes I/O usage.
Amazon Neptune automatically accounts for the price difference between the Neptune Standard and I/O-Optimized Instances. To learn more, visit Amazon Neptune pricing page

cards.title: Neptune Standard Configuration Cluster Instances
cards.helpText: Amazon Neptune is a fast, reliable, fully managed graph database service that makes it easy to build and run applications that work with highly connected datasets.

cards.title: Amazon Neptune Workbench
cards.helpText: Amazon Neptune Workbench lets you quickly and easily query your Neptune databases with Jupyter notebooks – a fully managed, interactive development environment with live code and narrative text.

templates.title: Neptune Serverless
templates.description: Database capacity automatically scales up or down to meet your application needs.

cards.title: Serverless Configuration Option
cards.description: Database instance, storage and IO charges will vary based on the configuration. Review Amazon Aurora pricing for more information

components.content: Cost effective pricing for many applications with moderate I/O usage (I/O costs <25% of total database costs). Pay-per-request I/O charges apply. DB instance and storage prices don't include I/O usage.

Predictable pricing for all applications. Improved price-performance for I/O-intensive applications (I/O costs >25% of total database costs).No additional charges for read/write I/O operations. DB instance and storage prices includes I/O usage.
Amazon Neptune automatically accounts for the price difference between the Neptune Standard and I/O-Optimized Instances. To learn more, visit Amazon Neptune pricing page

components.label: price for neptune serverless standard configuration
price for neptune serverless IO optimized configuration

cards.title: Amazon Neptune Serverless Setting
cards.helpText: Neptune Serverless is a serverless deployment option for Neptune Database. It is an on-demand, auto-scaling deployment option that automatically adjusts database capacity based on application needs.

templates.title: Neptune Analytics
templates.description: The graph is provisioned to support the instance you select.

cards.title: Neptune Analytics
cards.helpText: Neptune Analytics is an analytics database engine for Neptune to perform fast analytics operations over tens of billions of graph connections in seconds.
